what_it_does: Defines the triad_synth reduce-role and its output schema for a spec-compiler: it consumes a composed 'notes' input of grounded criteria and instructs a model to emit three markdown documents (Completion-Criteria, Implementation-Guide, Research-Synthesis).
observations: Declares a Pydantic TriadSynthOut model with three markdown-string fields.
The ROLE dict is pure metadata/prompt data with no executable runtime logic.
input_addresses is ('notes',), expecting run_reduce to dynamically compose upstream ground_criterion outputs.
It is fired explicitly via run_reduce(mode='role', role='triad_synth'), not by any cast.
The prompt asks for full markdown documents in a build-prep house style with two-faced FUNCTION/FORM criteria and honest status markers.
It repeatedly warns that the default 512 max_tokens will truncate the three-document JSON and cause a fail-loud parse error.
It includes a declared reduce rule ('reduce-triad-synth') in the rules list.
No mode_scope is declared, keeping it out of automatic swarm casts.
standouts: Returns three independent markdown documents in one JSON object, unlike flatter reduce-role outputs.
Strong fail-loud design signal around output token budget.
Explicitly mirrors reduce_synth/score_options input seam while differing in output shape.
conventions: Uses Pydantic BaseModel for structured output schema.
ROLE dict follows the expected role-definition key set: id, label, description, prompt_template, output_schema, input_addresses, op, trigger, model_binding, rules, render_hint.
input_addresses is a tuple of declared non-utterance inputs.
rules entries include kind 'reduce' and describe reads/effect.
render_hint carries shape and lane hints.
concerns: Contains no code that enforces the generous max_tokens requirement; callers must know to set it.
The prompt template embeds an example JSON but does not inject a formal machine schema beyond output_schema.
If ever auto-fired in a cast without the composed 'notes' input, it would fail loudly as noted.
notes: This file is the data-only role definition for the spec-compiler's reduce step that joins grounded criteria into three loop-prep markdown documents.
questions: What is the exact schema/format of each item in the composed 'notes' input?
How does run_reduce locate and render the dynamic upstream ground_criterion run:// addresses into 'notes'?
Where is the detailed build-prep house style documented beyond the hints in the prompt?
What is the relationship between this role's output and the subsequent build/approval steps?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to be a pure reduce-role definition that assembles grounded criteria into a triad; the file matches that purpose exactly, containing only schema, prompt, and metadata declarations.
apparent_themes: Reduce/synthesize pattern over dynamic map outputs
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to turn a manual, error-prone triad-assembly process into a reproducible, driver-invoked reduce step while keeping the role off automatic casts so it only runs when the right composed input is available.
novelty: The explicit three-document 'triad' output shape and the repeated, load-bearing warning about token budget for multi-document JSON generation.
contribution: Provides a structured role definition and output schema for the spec-compiler's reduce step, encoding the three-document loop-prep artifact shape and the dynamic 'notes' input seam so a driver can compose and invoke the join.
summary_for_embedding: roles/triad_synth.py defines the triad_synth reduce-role and its TriadSynthOut Pydantic schema for joining multiple grounded criteria into three markdown loop-prep documents.
intention_for_embedding: To automate the cross-criterion synthesis step of a spec-compiler by producing Completion-Criteria, Implementation-Guide, and Research-Synthesis from composed ground-check outputs.

symbols.does: Pydantic output model for the triad_synth reduce-role.
symbols.description: Defines three string fields—completion_criteria, implementation_guide, and research_synthesis—each intended to hold a full markdown document returned by the role. It enforces the JSON output schema that run_reduce expects when invoking triad_synth.
